title: Thira
overview: Dr. Rohini Pranab , a doctor who runs an NGO and a shelter home for destitute girls, is targeted by human-traffickers. Her shelter home is attacked and all the children are taken. Naveen  finds her sister kidnapped right in front of his eyes by the same gang.
